name: @wxyc/concerts-similar-artists-enrichment
description: WXYC nightly cron (BS#1626): enrich upcoming curated in-library concert headliners with artist-level affinity neighbors from the semantic-index graph (WXYC/semantic-index#354), overwriting top-K neighbors on artist_similar_artists keyed by artists.id (the key GET /concerts projects onto Concert.similar_artists). Runs after the 05:15/05:35 artist resolvers + 05:45 genre enrichment; full-window nightly re-fetch keeps neighbors current with the graph rebuild; --backfill front-fills existing resolved in-library headliners once; cooperative pause defers when DJs are active.
